title: Measures installed under SHDF Wave 2 and HUG 2: Statistical audit results
body: "This report summarises the results of a randomised sample of audits, commissioned by DESNZ, to understand the extent of non-compliance in all measures installed through the following government schemes:   Social Housing Decarbonisation Fund (SHDF) Wave 2 Home Upgrade Grant Phase 2 (HUG 2)   "
